description_long: This is a rustic, two-wheeled handcart constructed primarily from dark, weathered wood, featuring a rectangular cargo bed with open slats for drainage and ventilation. The cart has sturdy wooden side rails on both sides and at the rear, providing containment for transported goods. Two large, spoked wooden wheels are mounted centrally on either side, supported by a robust wooden axle. The front of the cart extends into a pair of long, straight wooden handles, designed for manual pulling or pushing. Metal reinforcements are visible at key structural points, such as the wheel hubs and handle joints, enhancing durability. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for transporting goods or materials in urban or rural settings.
description: A dark wooden handcart with two large spoked wheels, open slatted cargo bed, and long front handles for manual transport. Side rails and metal reinforcements add to its sturdy, rustic appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the handcart, including the large spoked wheel, open slatted bed, and long front handles.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open cargo bed, parallel handles, and the width between the side rails.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the other wheel, side rails, and the full length of the handles.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the open slatted bed, rear side rails, and the spacing between the wheels.
